label: OpenTelemetry Collector
description: Vendor-agnostic observability framework for collecting traces, metrics and logs

exporters.description: List of telemetry exporters (e.g. otlp, jaeger, prometheus)

processors.description: List of data processors (e.g. batch, memory_limiter)

receivers.description: List of telemetry receivers (e.g. otlp, jaeger, zipkin)
